title: Floral Gooey Syrian Bramley Apple Stir-fry
description: A floral, gooey one-pot Syrian dish featuring bramley apples that are gently roasted and stir-fried until they reach a perfect caramelized state. This kosher-friendly meal is both appetizing and comforting.
instructions: Place the Bramley apple in a baking dish with the olive oil, cumin, salt, pepper, and lemon juice. Toss gently until the apples are coated evenly.
Roast in the preheated oven for about 25-30 minutes or until the apples are tender but still slightly firm, turning once during cooking to ensure even browning on both sides.
While the apples are roasting, heat a bit of olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add the garlic and cook for about 1 minute until fragrant but not browned.
Add the roasted Bramley apple slices into the pan with the garlic to stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes, allowing the apples to reabsorb some of their caramelized juices and become gooey.
Serve warm, garnished with a bit more lemon zest if desired.
